name: Cherry Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, oats, sugar, chopped pecans, and baking soda.
2. Add the melted butter to the dry ingredients. Mix at low speed until crumbly.
3. Reserve 1 1/2 cups of the mixture for topping. Press the remaining mixture into the bottom of a 9 x 13 x 2 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. Spread the cherry pie filling evenly over the crust.
6. Sprinkle marshmallows and the reserved crumbs over the top.
7. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 25 to 35 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
8. Cut into bars when cool.
